title: Infosys Incorporates Step-Down Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Australia
detailed_summary: Infosys completed incorporation of a step-down wholly owned subsidiary, Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd, in Australia on March 19, 2026. The entity has share capital of AUD 10, no applicable turnover, and belongs to the Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry. Infosys Singapore Pte. Ltd. holds 100% of its shareholding.

key_facts.fact: Infosys completed incorporating a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary named Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd in Australia.
Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd has share capital of AUD 10 and turnover is not applicable.
100% of the shareholding is held by Infosys Singapore Pte. Ltd., a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys completed incorporation of Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd as a step-down wholly owned subsidiary in Australia.
